Page.description: Track live gold, silver, platinum & palladium prices in USD, Jordanian Dinar, Saudi Riyal, UAE Dirham, Egyptian Pound and 40+ currencies across 24K, 21K, 18K and 14K karats. Updated every minute on Gold Prices Arabia.
Page.intro: Gold Prices Arabia — live spot prices for gold, silver, platinum and palladium across MENA and worldwide. 46 countries, every karat, every minute. Refreshed from FOREXCOM.
Page.aboutH2: About Gold Prices Arabia — Live Gold for MENA
Page.aboutP1: Gold Prices Arabia brings live precious-metal pricing to the Arab world and beyond: pure spot data, no markups, no fluff. From Saudi to Egypt to global markets — straight from the source.
Page.aboutP2: Gold Prices Arabia surfaces live spot prices for gold (XAU), silver (XAG), platinum (XPT) and palladium (XPD) alongside karat-derived rates (24K, 21K, 18K, 14K) — the four most-traded karats in Arab jewellery markets.

Faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about live gold prices on Gold Prices Arabia.
Faq.supportBody: We're here to help! Get in touch with our support.

items.q: How often does Gold Prices Arabia update gold prices?
items.a: Live spot prices refresh every minute from the FOREXCOM XAUUSD feed via goldapi.io. Pages cache for 60 seconds at the edge so visitors always see fresh data without overloading the upstream API.
Gold Prices Arabia covers 24K (pure gold), 21K (87.5% pure — the dominant karat in Saudi Arabia and Jordan), 18K (75% pure — common across UAE and Egypt), and 14K (58.3% pure).
US Dollar (USD), Jordanian Dinar (JOD), Saudi Riyal (SAR), UAE Dirham (AED), and Egyptian Pound (EGP). FX rates are static — confirm with your bank before any transaction.

items.q: Where do the prices come from?
items.a: Spot price is sourced from goldapi.io, which aggregates the FOREXCOM:XAUUSD feed. Karat prices are derived from the spot using the standard purity ratios published by the World Gold Council.
Yes. Gold Prices Arabia is free for personal and informational use. Always confirm with a licensed jeweller or bullion dealer before buying or selling.

InfoPage.aboutIntro: Gold Prices Arabia is an independent live-price reference for the MENA gold market. We aggregate spot gold (XAU/USD) from PAXG/USD WebSocket feeds across Binance, Coinbase, and Kraken, then convert into 40+ retail currencies and four karat purities every second.
InfoPage.aboutMission: Make the live spot gold price — and its retail equivalents in Saudi Riyal, Jordanian Dinar, UAE Dirham, Egyptian Pound and 36 more currencies — free, accurate and ad-light for every consumer, jeweller and trader in the Arab world and beyond.
InfoPage.aboutTeamBody: Gold Prices Arabia was founded by Sadeq Sayed Ahmad, a software developer focused on transparent, ad-light financial reference tools for Arabic-speaking users. See the founder page for full background and contact details. The site publishes prices, not advice.
InfoPage.aboutContact: General enquiries: support@goldpricesarabia.com. Advertising: ads@goldpricesarabia.com. Press / corrections: support@goldpricesarabia.com.
InfoPage.methodologyH1: Methodology — How we calculate gold prices
InfoPage.methodologyIntro: Every number on this site is derived from observable, third-party market data. Below is exactly how it is sourced, transformed and presented.
InfoPage.methodologySpot: Spot gold is computed as the per-tick median of three WebSocket feeds: Binance PAXG/USDT, Coinbase PAXG-USD, and Kraken PAXG/USD. PAX Gold (PAXG) is an ERC-20 token backed 1:1 by physical 1 oz London Good Delivery gold bars held in Brink's vaults and audited monthly by Withum. PAXG trades within a few cents of the LBMA spot benchmark. Using the median of three venues prevents single-exchange outliers from contaminating the displayed price.
InfoPage.methodologyKarat: Karat prices per gram are computed as: spot_per_gram × purity_ratio, where purity ratios are 99.9% (24K), 87.5% (21K), 75% (18K), 58.3% (14K) per the World Gold Council. No retailer premium, refining loss or VAT is added — these are pure spot equivalents. Local jewellery shops will quote a premium above this number.
InfoPage.methodologyFx: FX conversion to JOD, SAR, AED, EGP and 36 other currencies uses the open-source fawazahmed0/currency-api feed, refreshed once per day from central-bank mid-market rates. We do not apply a retail spread — confirm at-the-counter rates with your bank.
InfoPage.methodologyOther: Silver (XAG), platinum (XPT) and palladium (XPD) spot prices update once per minute via STOOQ aggregated feeds (FOREXCOM symbols). These are not WebSocket-streamed because the underlying markets are less liquid than gold; minute-cadence is sufficient.
InfoPage.methodologyHistory: Historical daily OHLC for gold is sourced from Yahoo Finance via query1.finance.yahoo.com for the GC=F (COMEX gold futures) and XAU=X tickers. Data is cached for 24 hours.
InfoPage.methodologyLimits: 1) PAXG/USD is a proxy for LBMA spot — it correlates extremely tightly but is not the LBMA fix. 2) FX rates are mid-market — your bank's retail rate will differ by 0.5–3%. 3) Karat prices exclude retailer premium, refining loss and VAT/tax. 4) Crypto-coin pricing on /cryptocurrency/* uses CoinGecko cached at 5-minute intervals.
InfoPage.editorialIntro: Gold Prices Arabia is a price-reference publication. We publish data, not financial advice.
InfoPage.editorialIndependence: No advertiser, affiliate partner or content sponsor influences price calculation, methodology or what we publish. Sponsored content, where present, is clearly labelled and visually separated from editorial.
InfoPage.editorialAccuracy: Spot, karat and FX numbers are pulled live from third-party feeds; visible upstream outages are flagged. If you spot a calculation error, email support@goldpricesarabia.com — corrections are issued within 24h and any cached page is purged.
InfoPage.editorialAffiliate: Some 'Buy gold' pages link to bullion dealers via affiliate programmes. We may earn a commission when you open an account or purchase. Commissions do not influence the prices we show or whether dealers are listed.
InfoPage.editorialAds: Display advertising is served via Google AdSense and a small allowlist of vetted finance partners. We do not accept advertising from products we judge to be predatory, scammy or non-compliant with local financial regulation.
InfoPage.editorialPrivacy: No personal data is collected without consent. Analytics use first-party cookies; advertising cookies require explicit opt-in under GDPR / Saudi PDPL. Email us at support@goldpricesarabia.com to request data deletion.

AuthorPage.title: Sadeq Sayed Ahmad — Founder of Gold Prices Arabia
AuthorPage.description: Sadeq Sayed Ahmad is the founder and lead developer of Gold Prices Arabia, building transparent live gold pricing infrastructure for Arabic-speaking users.
AuthorPage.bio1: Sadeq Sayed Ahmad is a software developer and the founder of Gold Prices Arabia. He built the platform to make international gold pricing transparent and accessible to Arabic-speaking users across the MENA region.
AuthorPage.bio2: The site aggregates live spot gold (XAU/USD) from PAXG/USD WebSocket feeds on Binance, Coinbase and Kraken, then converts these prices into 40+ retail currencies — including Saudi Riyal, Jordanian Dinar, UAE Dirham and Egyptian Pound — using daily mid-market FX rates from open central-bank data.
AuthorPage.bio3: Sadeq does not provide trading or investment advice. The platform publishes observable market data, not financial guidance. Users seeking trading or investment recommendations should consult a licensed financial advisor in their jurisdiction.
AuthorPage.expertise1: Software engineering — full-stack development with Next.js, TypeScript, real-time data infrastructure (WebSocket aggregation), serverless deployment on Netlify.
AuthorPage.expertise2: Data transparency — building open, ad-light, methodology-first reference sites for financial commodities. All calculation logic is documented publicly at /methodology.
AuthorPage.expertise3: Arabic-language web — focus on RTL accessibility, locale-aware UX and MENA-specific currency/jewellery conventions.
AuthorPage.connectIntro: For corrections, partnerships, or technical discussion:
AuthorPage.contactNote: All editorial corrections are issued within 24 hours and cached pages are purged. See /editorial-standards for full corrections policy.
